mainEntity.name: Can small LA firms compete with big firms for ChatGPT recommendations?
mainEntity.text: Can small LA firms compete with big firms for ChatGPT recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, small LA firms compete via hyper-local SEO, video testimonials, and niche expertise outperforming big firms' generic pages.

suggestedAnswer.text: Target long-tail like 'LA boutique employment lawyer.' Build reviews fast. Big firms have budget edge, but agility wins.

name: Small vs Big LA Firms on ChatGPT
description: Yes, small LA firms compete via hyper-local SEO, video testimonials, and niche expertise outperforming big firms' generic pages.
